summary: Comprehensive validation of ideaGround video-sharing investment platform. All 27 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified all major pages and features work correctly including Dashboard, Video Player, Portfolio, Watchlist, Wallet, Explore, and Investor Metrics.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/videos returns list of videos with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/creators returns list of creators
Backend: GET /api/market-ticker returns ticker data array
Backend: GET /api/market-overview returns all 8 categories (top_gainers, top_losers, hot_stocks, early_bonus, undervalued, best_roi, new_listings, most_traded)
Backend: GET /api/activity/live returns recent activity
Backend: POST /api/auth/demo-login creates session and returns user data
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/portfolio returns user portfolio with holdings
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/performance returns performance summary
Backend: GET /api/watchlist returns user watchlist
Backend: GET /api/wallet returns wallet balance and transactions
Backend: GET /api/videos/{video_id} returns video details with price history
Backend: GET /api/videos/{video_id}/top-earners returns investor leaderboard
Backend: POST /api/shares/buy purchases shares with price impact
Backend: POST /api/shares/sell sells shares with early investor bonus
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/add adds video to watchlist
Backend: GET /api/watchlist/check/{video_id} checks watchlist status
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/remove removes from watchlist
Backend: POST /api/wallet/deposit adds funds to wallet
Backend: GET /api/videos/{video_id}/comments returns comments with reward tiers
Backend: POST /api/comments posts new comment
Backend: POST /api/comments/vote votes on comment
Backend: POST /api/simulate-prices updates video prices
Backend: GET /api/creators/{creator_id} returns creator profile with videos
Backend: GET /api/platform/investor-metrics returns platform economics
Backend: POST /api/videos/{video_id}/like toggles video like
Backend: POST /api/creators/{creator_id}/subscribe toggles subscription
Frontend: Landing page loads with ideaGround branding, Google Sign in, Trending Creators
Frontend: Dashboard shows welcome message, wallet balance, video cards, shorts, live activity, market activity panels
Frontend: Video Player shows video embed, trading card with price/chart, buy shares dialog, comments section
Frontend: Portfolio shows total value, investment history chart, holdings with P&L, sell/redeem buttons
Frontend: Watchlist shows watched videos with investment analysis card, key metrics, buy/remove buttons
Frontend: Wallet shows balance, add funds button, transaction history
Frontend: Explore shows video grid with sector filters, search, videos/creators tabs
Frontend: Investor Metrics (/investors) shows platform metrics, revenue model, trading statistics
critical_code_review_comments: All major features are working correctly
Early Investor Bonus system properly displays tiers (Platinum 2.5x, Gold 2.0x, Silver 1.5x)
Price impact on buy/sell is correctly calculated and displayed
Market Activity Dashboard shows all 8 expandable panels with correct data
Comments section includes reward tiers for micro-shares
Portfolio shows unrealized gains and early investor bonus potential
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo user and seeded video/creator data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features validated: Authentication (demo login), Dashboard (videos, shorts, market activity, live feed), Video Player (trading card, buy shares, comments, early investor bonus), Portfolio (holdings, P&L, performance chart), Watchlist (investment analysis), Wallet (balance, deposit, transactions), Explore (filters, search), Investor Metrics (/investors route). No issues found.
